markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on CVE project launch, content workflow, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE Launch Imminent:** The project is unblocked with ContentStack access; a demo tomorrow will finalize the 808-page launch plan.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [**New Content OS Live:** A new Airtable view streamlines SentinelOne reviews, providing clear status updates and feedback channels.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Strong AI Performance:** S1's visibility grew 91% in 12 weeks, with a 12% citation rate (vs. 3–5% competitor average) and a high 58% engagement rate from LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Automated Workflow Proposed:** SentinelOne requested an automated push from GrowthX's Atlas platform to ContentStack to streamline publishing and enable localization.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Topics

### CVE Project Launch

  - [**Status:** Unblocked. GrowthX now has GitHub and ContentStack management token access.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Publish 808 CVE pages over two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Cadence:** 30–50 pages published manually by SentinelOne daily.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Pages were selected for recency and high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [**Continuous Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Workflow:** GrowthX will use the Atlas platform to push new CVEs as drafts to ContentStack.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
      - [**Future Cadence:** GrowthX will propose a plan for ongoing publishing, balancing speed with site indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Content Workflow & OS

  - [**New Airtable View:** A new "Content OS" view is live to streamline SentinelOne's review process.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Key Tabs:**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [**Topic Spending Approval:** Update status and add feedback directly.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Articles for SentinelOne Review:** Track articles with GrowthX; add revision notes.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**CVE Pages by Status:** View launch pages ("In Progress") and the full database ("Backlog").](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Action:** SentinelOne will review \~30 assignments lacking status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### AI Performance & Tracking

  - [**Scrunch (Competitive Analysis):**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Visibility:** +91% over 12 weeks for 235 tracked prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Citations:** +17% over 12 weeks, reaching 12% of responses.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
          - [**Significance:** This high rate (vs. a 3–5% competitor average) indicates S1 is a trusted, "answer-rich" resource for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [**Looker (On-Site Engagement):**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**Traffic:** ChatGPT is the top LLM referrer.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** 58% of LLM users are "engaged" (spent \>10s, scrolled, or clicked).](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [**Top Pages:** Homepage, Cybersecurity 101 articles, and platform pages.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**Action:** SentinelOne requested a list of Scrunch's 235 prompts to align with their internal Profound tool.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Update the CVE release plan with timelines after tomorrow's demo.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [Export and share the Scrunch report PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Share the list of 235 Scrunch prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Ask Marcus about automating the Atlas → ContentStack workflow for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:**](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Review \~30 outstanding content assignments in the new Airtable OS.](https://fathom.video/share/tLaedPxgie989Sz2RGArMJ3TDZqn85gT?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
